headline: Tripadvisor (TRIP) Is Up 5.9% After Selling TheFork To AmEx For $700 Million In Cash
summary: In June 2026, Tripadvisor agreed to sell its restaurant reservation platform TheFork to American Express for US$700,000,000 in cash, reinforcing a pivot away from legacy operations toward its travel experiences marketplace anchored by Viator. This move highlights Tripadvisor’s push to simplify its portfolio and unlock capital that can be redeployed into higher-growth experiences businesses while an activist-influenced board explores options to enhance overall shareholder value. We’ll now...
